steps.title: Recognize the explicit goal
steps.content: The student needs to identify what type of scientist Chaudhuri is—not just her field, but her professional title. The notes provide both: Chaudhuri studies sedimentary rocks, and sedimentary-rock scientists are called sedimentologists.

steps.title: Apply the definition directly
steps.content: Choice D answers the goal by applying the provided term to Chaudhuri. The other choices mention related information but never identify the specific type of scientist she is. That confirms D is correct.
